task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the patient record for Ana Isabel Betz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should display the patient record or dashboard for 'Ana Isabel Betz' (PUID: GNU777ORG).

task_completion.description: Verify that a clinical evaluation was created with the specified symptoms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clinical evaluation form should be visible with 'chest tightness' and 'cough' entered in the chief complaint or subjective symptoms section.

task_completion.description: Verify that Byssinosis was added as an active diagnosis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conditions/diagnoses list should show 'Byssinosis' or the ICD-10 code 'J66' / 'J66.0' marked as an active diagnosis.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two diagnostic tests were ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lab/test requests section should show at least two distinct diagnostic tests (e.g., Spirometry, Chest X-ray) ordered for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that a respiratory medication was prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prescriptions or medication section should show an order for a respiratory drug (e.g., Albuterol, Salbutamol, Fluticasone, Budesonide, Ipratropium, Tiotropium, Salmeterol, or Formoterol).

task_completion.description: Verify that a follow-up appointment was scheduled for 14 to 30 days in the future.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment scheduling screen should show a new appointment for the patient with a date set 14 to 30 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GNU Health GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the GNU Health graphical user interface, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text and selections should be visible inside GNU Health's specific input fields, dropdowns, and forms, rather than in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running Python, SQL, or bash scripts to directly insert the records into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG). Diagnosis must be Byssinosis (ICD-10: J66 or J66.0). Symptoms to record: 'chest tightness' and 'cough'. At least 2 diagnostic tests must be ordered. Prescribed medication must be a respiratory drug (acceptable substrings: Albuterol, Salbutamol, Fluticasone, Budesonide, Ipratropium, Tiotropium, Salmeterol, Formoterol). Follow-up appointment must be scheduled 14 to 30 days from the current date (13 to 31 days is acceptable for leniency).
